testcase.name: tc_pay_001_getSalaryComponentsJohn

testcase.name: tc_pay_009_getPayslipsForSeededCycle

failure.message: Feb 2026 cycle should have 2 seeded payslips expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Feb 2026 cycle should have 2 seeded payslips expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
